name: demo-direct-install
title: Demo Direct Install
description: Hermetic Docker acceptance fixture for the equip CLI

rules.content: Use the registry helper augment when you need deterministic demo fixture data.

files.content:
# Registry Helper

Use this skill to inspect hermetic registry fixture responses during Docker acceptance tests.
Run `equip demo-direct-install --platform claude-code,codex --non-interactive` to exercise this fixture.
